title: Ice Age
description: Covers the entire world in snow
body:
# Ice Age

This mod causes snow to fall in all biomes, lowers their temperature and changes grass and foliage color.
It's not required client-side but not having it installed will cause the game to render the default precipitation for every biome.

<details>
<summary>Old version</summary>

Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) 0.60.0 or above, and [Fabric loader](https://fabricmc.net/) version 0.14.9 or above.
[https://github.com/n643064/Ice-Age](https://github.com/n643064/Ice-Age)
</details>
